workflow_title: Upload and Publish Property Images in Lucas Fox Salesforce

steps.what_happened: Navigated to the Web Manager section of the property record.
steps.why_this_action: To access the image and publication management tools for the property.
steps.preconditions: Property record is open in Salesforce.
steps.visual_feedback: The Web Manager tab is highlighted, and the Web Manager page is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Navigated to the Images section within Web Manager.
steps.why_this_action: To manage the images associated with the property listing.
steps.preconditions: Web Manager page is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The Images tab is highlighted, and the Images page is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Selected the image to be published.
steps.why_this_action: To choose the image that will be added to the property listing.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the image is visible in the Remaining images section.
steps.visual_feedback: A checkmark appears in the checkbox, indicating the image is selected.

steps.what_happened: Initiated the publishing process for the selected image.
steps.why_this_action: To move the selected image from the 'Remaining' section to the 'Published' section.
steps.preconditions: An image is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: A 'Publish these images' modal dialog appears.

steps.what_happened: Confirmed the publishing of the selected image.
steps.why_this_action: To finalize the publishing process and make the image visible on the property listing.
steps.preconditions: 'Publish these images' modal is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The image is being uploaded, and a progress bar is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Closed the publishing confirmation dialog.
steps.why_this_action: To return to the Images page after successfully publishing the image.
steps.preconditions: Image publishing is complete.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Publish these images' modal closes, and the Images page is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Dragged the Balcony image to reorder it.
steps.why_this_action: To change the order in which the images are displayed on the property listing.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the images are visible in the Published images section.
steps.visual_feedback: The image is moved to a new position in the list.

target_element.description: Drop target for the Balcony image

steps.what_happened: Dropped the Balcony image to reorder it.
steps.why_this_action: To change the order in which the images are displayed on the property listing.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the images are visible in the Published images section.
steps.visual_feedback: The image is moved to a new position in the list.

target_element.description: Tag icon for the kitchen image

steps.what_happened: Clicked the tag icon to label the kitchen image.
steps.why_this_action: To add a label to the image, which helps with SEO and user understanding.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the kitchen image is visible in the Published images section.
steps.visual_feedback: A 'Select the image label' modal dialog appears.

steps.what_happened: Selected the 'Kitchen' label for the image.
steps.why_this_action: To accurately describe the content of the image.
steps.preconditions: 'Select the image label' modal is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Kitchen' label is selected.

steps.what_happened: Saved the label for the kitchen image.
steps.why_this_action: To apply the selected label to the image.
steps.preconditions: A label is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Select the image label' modal closes, and the Images page is displayed.

steps.input_data: Scroll down to reveal more images
steps.what_happened: Scrolled down to reveal more images in the 'Remaining images' section.
steps.why_this_action: To access more images that need to be published.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the 'Remaining images' section is visible.
steps.visual_feedback: More images are displayed in the 'Remaining images' section.

steps.what_happened: Selected the image to be published.
steps.why_this_action: To choose the image that will be added to the property listing.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the image is visible in the Remaining images section.
steps.visual_feedback: A checkmark appears in the checkbox, indicating the image is selected.

steps.what_happened: Initiated the publishing process for the selected image.
steps.why_this_action: To move the selected image from the 'Remaining' section to the 'Published' section.
steps.preconditions: An image is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: A 'Publish these images' modal dialog appears.

steps.what_happened: Confirmed the publishing of the selected image.
steps.why_this_action: To finalize the publishing process and make the image visible on the property listing.
steps.preconditions: 'Publish these images' modal is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The image is being uploaded, and a progress bar is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Closed the publishing confirmation dialog.
steps.why_this_action: To return to the Images page after successfully publishing the image.
steps.preconditions: Image publishing is complete.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Publish these images' modal closes, and the Images page is displayed.

steps.what_happened: Clicked the tag icon to label the image.
steps.why_this_action: To add a label to the image, which helps with SEO and user understanding.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the image is visible in the Published images section.
steps.visual_feedback: A 'Select the image label' modal dialog appears.

steps.what_happened: Selected the 'Balcony' label for the image.
steps.why_this_action: To accurately describe the content of the image.
steps.preconditions: 'Select the image label' modal is open.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Balcony' label is selected.

steps.what_happened: Saved the label for the image.
steps.why_this_action: To apply the selected label to the image.
steps.preconditions: A label is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: The 'Select the image label' modal closes, and the Images page is displayed.

steps.input_data: Scroll down to reveal more images
steps.what_happened: Scrolled down to reveal more images in the 'Remaining images' section.
steps.why_this_action: To access more images that need to be published.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the 'Remaining images' section is visible.
steps.visual_feedback: More images are displayed in the 'Remaining images' section.

steps.what_happened: Selected all the remaining images to be published.
steps.why_this_action: To publish all the images at once.
steps.preconditions: Images page is open, and the images are visible in the Remaining images section.
steps.visual_feedback: A checkmark appears in the checkbox, indicating the image is selected.

steps.what_happened: Initiated the publishing process for the selected image.
steps.why_this_action: To move the selected image from the 'Remaining' section to the 'Published' section.
steps.preconditions: An image is selected.
steps.visual_feedback: A 'Publish these images' modal dialog appears.

workflow_summary: This workflow describes how to upload and publish property images from Synology to Lucas Fox Salesforce, including reordering and tagging the images for better web positioning.

decision_points.description: The user decides to publish the selected image.

potential_variations: The number of images to be published may vary. The order in which the images are reordered may vary. The labels assigned to the images may vary.
error_handling_observed: No error handling was observed in this workflow.
